state_facets.name: knowledge_update
state_facets.value: User's personal best time in a charity 5K run is 25 minutes and 50 seconds.

808d9ebf278b3c86c484f4a497a509efcaa07c75.answer_rationale: The user initially stated a personal best of 27:12 on 2023/05/23, but later (2023/05/30) expressed a goal to beat a personal best of 25:50, indicating an update. The assistant also referenced the 25:50 time. Per the knowledge-update instruction, the latest valid value is 25:50.
